Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Trending Markets | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**

signals.headline: No Trending X Posts on Whales or Mispriced Markets | NO smart money moves shared | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
No Trending X Posts on Whales or Mispriced Markets | NO smart money moves shared | LOW confidence**  
Search results show no real-time X (Twitter) posts from Polymarket traders about whale bets, prediction tips, or mispriced markets; focus is on platform odds for pop culture tweets like Kanye's activity by April 30[1][3]. XTracker exists for social analytics but lacks specific current posts[5].
